title: DOKRVLOQ Collapsible Laundry Washing Baskets Grey Bamboo Cloth Fabric 50l Large Foldable Wash Clothes Storage Ironing Basket Folding Space Saving Laundry Hamper
features: Suitable size: laundry baskets single size: 54 x 33 x 29 cm (L x W x H), single capacity: 50 litres.
High-quality material: folding box is made of bamboo borders and Oxford. Environmentally friendly and healthy, no peculiar smell, to clean.
Foldable design: you only need to support the four bamboo strips and stick the Velcro fastener. When not in use, folded height: 3 cm

Multi-purpose: can not only be used for laundry collectors, can also be used for clothes storage, sweaters, paper waste, food, toys, books, toilet paper storage etc., suitable for balconies, children's rooms, bathrooms, under sinks, bedrooms and as well as office cabinets, cupboard organisation, Kallax shelves car storage box etc.
With handle: the two ends with handle, the box can be easily pulled out of the shelf or cupboard.
description: Product Description Natural Bamboo Combined With OxfordCloth THE PERFECT COMBINATION OF NATURAL MATERIALS The Perfect Combination Of Natural Bamboo And Sturdy Oxford Cloth. The Product Carrier System Is Made Of Natural Bamboo, And The Storage Space Is Made Of Oxford Cloth, Which Is Durable And Easy To Clean. SIMPLE AND COMPACT-FOLDS FLAT IN SECONDS FOLDABLE & STABLE - The storage basket is very easy to set up and folds up again just as quickly. The bamboo frame ensures a firm grip and high dimensional stability. LARGE CAPACITY More usage scenarios to meet various storage needs in life. 50l CAPACITY - The laundry hamper offers space for the laundry of the whole family and is the perfect one. POWERFUL FACTORY-Efficient production workshop The video showcases the product in use. The video guides you through product setup. The video compares multiple products. The video shows the product being unpacked. Video Player is loading. We Have A Complete Supply Chain, Well-Equipped And Efficient Production Workshop, Excellent Design Team, Providing B2b Customized After-Sales Services, Providing You With Efficient And High-Quality Home Products. We Welcome Your Inquiries And Cooperation！ Due to differences in customer monitors and variations in the environment in which the product is photographed, the product will appear in different colors, please refer to the actual color received as the final color. Because the product is made of natural bamboo, when using it, please do not soak it in water for a long time and take care to keep it dry to avoid deformation and mildew. Since long-term shipping may make the product wrinkled, supporting and using it for a period of time will recover it. Because the product is made of natural bamboo, there are errors, which are the sign and gift of nature, it is not a quality problem, please understand.
